creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #2)
Funny. Please go back and try to read and understand my previous message. You might want to hover over the + with your mouse and read what + on maintainer-feeback actually means.

https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla/DosAndDonts

DON'TS
Please, do not: 
...
use maintainer-feedback flag to declare approval of a patch. (DO use the maintainer-approval flag)

So yes I *think* I can read :)
